arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola breaks silence on two new Man City signings after £63m double deal
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola spoke about the two defenders that the Blues have completed January deals for

arts.ttl: Man City target Omar Marmoush undergoes his medical after club agrees £67m signing with Eintracht Frankfurt - as Cityzens spark January spending spree
arts.sum: Mail Sport exclusively revealed City's interest in the Egyptian international last month, and the club have already agreed personal terms with the forward.

arts.ttl: Man City sign Reis in £29.6m deal from Palmeiras
arts.sum: Manchester City sign Brazilian defender Vitor Reis in a £29.6m deal from Palmeiras.

arts.ttl: Manchester City and AC Milan reach loan agreement for Kyle Walker
arts.sum: Manchester City and AC Milan have reached an agreement regarding a loan move for England international fullback Kyle Walker (34), according to a report from L’Equipe. The 34-year-old is set…

arts.ttl: Man City in danger of exit - how Champions League stands
arts.sum: Manchester City are in danger of Champions League elimination, while Liverpool have six wins from six and Arsenal and Aston Villa are flying.

arts.ttl: John Stones in, Jeremy Doku out - Man City squad for PSG as Rodri travels
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola has named a 21-man squad to face Paris Saint-Germain in the Champions League

arts.ttl: 'He has it all': Manchester City told they've now signed a top talent who's truly 'complete'
arts.sum: Manchester City have been busy in the January transfer window, getting two signings over the line with another one said to be on the way....

arts.ttl: I know Man City's next signing will be a success - because Pep Guardiola did the same thing with me
arts.sum: Manchester City are set to announce the signing of Eintracht Frankfurt striker Omar Marmoush this week and he has the backing from Blues legend Sergio Aguero.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta hopeful William Saliba will be fit in time for Man City clash
arts.sum: Saliba will not be available for Arsenal’s penultimate Champions League group match against Dinamo Zagreb on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola’s Man City reach agreement to sign starring La Liga youngster
arts.sum: Premier League champions Manchester City are all set to sign an up-and-coming member of the defensive ranks at La Liga outfit Real Valladolid. That’s according to transfer insider Fabrizio Romano,…
